creator: lioux@uol.com.br
text:
Updated Mesa 3.1 to the latest official patch level and made it PREFIX
safe. It was not respecting prefix regarding the recently added mesa.conf
configuration file. It was always expecting it to be at /etc/mesa.conf
regardless of the ${PREFIX} variable.

+ Added file:
	files/mesa-conf.patch

It is pre-processed before being applied so that it holds the correct
PREFIX safe location.

How-To-Repeat: 
n/a
